lyrics.text: I JUST WANT TO ASK THE QUESTION
TO SAVE A WORLD IN DESPAIR
(IT FOLLOWS A WATER CRISIS IN FLINT...
WHEN THE CITY STARTED DRAWING WATER FROM THE FLINT RIVER,
EXPOSING THOUSANDS OF PEOPLE TO THE TOXIC METAL)
THERE'S TOO MANY OF YOU CRYING [BABY TALK]
[POLICE RADIO VOICE] 25, IT'S GONNA BE A BLACK MALE IN A WHITE T-SHIRT...)
THERE'S FAR TOO MANY OF YOU DYING (HE'S RUNNING TOWARD QUIK TRIP)
YOU KNOW WE'VE GOT TO FIND A WAY (WOULD BE UNINSURED NEXT YEAR)
TO BRING SOME LOVIN' HERE TODAY (HAPPENED IN PARKLAND FLORIDA AT...)
YOU SEE, WAR IS NOT THE ANSWER ♪ [POLICE CAR RADIO VOICE]
FOR ONLY LOVE CAN CONQUER HATE (OH OH OH)
YOU KNOW WE'VE GOT TO FIND A WAY (OH OH OH)
TO BRING SOME LOVIN' HERE TODAY, (OH OH OH)
TALK TO ME, SO YOU CAN SEE
OH, WHAT'S GOING ON (WHAT'S GOING ON)
YEAH, WHAT'S GOING ON (WHAT'S GOING ON)
AH, WHAT'S GOING ON (WHAT'S GOING ON)
OH, BUT WHO ARE THEY TO JUDGE US
OH, YOU KNOW WE'VE GOT TO FIND A WAY ♪ [VOCALIZING]
TO BRING SOME UNDERSTANDING HERE TODAY
I'LL TELL YOU WHAT'S GOING ON
RIGHT ON BABY, RIGHT ON BABY
RIGHT ON BABY, RIGHT ON BABY
YES I WANT TO KNOW WHAT'S GOING ON RIGHT NOW PEOPLE
